title: Colored-Pencil Identity Portrait
sourceTitle: Use Uploaded Photo As Identity Reference Turn

imagePrompts.prompt: Use the uploaded photo as the identity reference. Turn it into a realistic colored-pencil illustration with a soft hand-drawn doodle style. Keep the person’s face, hairstyle, expression, pose, and overall composition similar to the original photo. Add a clean paper background with colorful handwritten doodles, short random phrases, hearts, stars, arrows, flowers, and playful marks that match the mood of the photo. Make it feel cute, lively, artistic, and high-quality. No watermark
